changes.text: Dashboard fully tokenized — zero non-token color or radius utilities

Color tokens: semantic light + dark mode, full primitive palette
iOS Swift package — MilesTokens.swift with adaptive Color, Radius, and Spacing enums
Figma: dashboard screen capture in progress, token variables synced via hub plugin
